name: Big the cat (Big Momma/ Project X Love Potion Disaster) after incident and ending Part 1 (GF Big)
description:
Introducing Miss Big the Cat from the Sonic the Hedgehog series, featuring Project X Love Potion Disaster, the after incident.

With the incident solved, there was so many girls you wanted to be with, however, you remember the alluring Big Momma down at the beachside cabin, with the fish and in mind.

Note: Two Parts after the incident, I'll soon post the last part for Miss Big the Cat when after she becomes your girlfriend. Which reminds me, I should probably work on the other character endings, once I have no more other ideas and characters, should that ever come to that.
creator: arcwolf500
